pi_items.source: task.json description explicitly instructs the user to 'Create a new sheet named 'Menu_Pricing''
task.json description explicitly states to 'Enter 30% as the Target Food Cost % for all of them.'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new sheet exactly named 'Menu_Pricing' and using a target food cost of 30% (0.30) for all recipes, as explicitly requested in the task description. The initial spreadsheet data is synthetically generated by the environment setup script.
